---
title: "Data Clean"
author: "Peng-Ting Kuo"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

# Setup

```{r packages}
library(haven)
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
library(ggplot2)
```

# Datasets

```{r dataset}
df <- read_stata("Data/WeeksAPSR2012.dta")

colnames(df)
```

```{r IVs}
# Use GWF dataset to construct the IVs
gwf <- read_stata("./Data/GWF/GWF_AllPoliticalRegimes.dta")
gwf_case <- read_stata("./Data/GWF/GWFcases.dta")
gwf_tscs <- read_stata("./Data/GWF/GWFtscs.dta")
```

# Preprocessing
